title: Amortized Analysis and Dynamic Structures · Invariant Triage
summary: Guarantee long-run latency for a structure with occasional expensive rebuilds. Learners isolate plausible failures, compare competing hypotheses, and record cause-level repair evidence. Planned artifact: Repair a changed failure in an amortized-cost ledger and implementation and publish the reproduction, evidence, repair, and regression record. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and evidence defense.
objectives: Bound total operation cost over a sequence and derive amortized cost.
Assign credits that cover future expensive operations without negative balances.
Define a nonnegative potential and calculate amortized cost changes.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.
